title: Need to show list of project in dashboard/widgets

posts.author: azeem (azeem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I am in new in Monday.com, I need guidance, I have setup a form that is being used to get requirements from business users with expected timeline as well.

I want to show all those requirements in dashboard by using widget “Timeline”. but Timeline widget does not show all the fields “mainly Text Item” that are part of the form.

Please guide, how can I get all those fields including Text fields in Timeline widget?

posts.author: LHo (Leander Hobusch | monday.com ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m not sure I understand you fully but as a first try: You can put in a form the desired column. So you can have a calendar instead of a text box option for the timeline. The form will then put this information in a timeline column which you can export / include in dashboards. Does this help?
